authorization: CEO Decision 2026-05-25 P4 — Axis A v1 real-data integration design
purpose: Design how the Axis A v0 scaffold pipeline can connect to trusted real Taiwan stock data sources in a future implementation round. No src/, tests/, DB, data/, scripts/, or migration files are modified in P56.

stages.name: SnapshotLogCollector
stages.description: SnapshotLogRecord[] → frozen collector; getAll() returns readonly array

stages.name: SnapshotLogExporter
stages.description: Collector → SnapshotLogExport (exporterVersion, exportedAt, totalRecords, records, symbols, statuses, governanceSummary)

stages.name: SnapshotExportFilter
stages.description: SnapshotLogExport → filtered subset by status / symbol

stages.name: SnapshotExportDiff
stages.description: diffSnapshotLogExports(before, after) → SnapshotExportDiffReport (added, removed, unchanged, counts, diffedAt)

axisAV0ChainSummary.v0GapIdentified: All stages are in-memory scaffold only. ControlledResearchSnapshot inputs are caller-supplied stubs. No real DB source data flows through any stage.
axisAV0ChainSummary.v1DesignGoal: Connect the v0 chain entry point (ControlledResearchSnapshot) to actual source adapters that read from trusted, PIT-safe Prisma models. The chain stages P43–P52 remain unchanged. Only the input construction layer changes.

eligibleDesignCandidates.pitGate: date field (YYYY-MM-DD string, immutable after trading day closes)
eligibleDesignCandidates.pitDescription: StockQuote.date represents the trading date. Records are immutable once the exchange closes. Reading with 'WHERE date <= asOfDate ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1' is PIT-safe for the given asOfDate.
forbiddenAdaptations: Computing return or ROI from close values
Producing a buy/sell signal from price change
Using close as a prediction anchor
eligibleDesignCandidates.designNotes: StockQuote is the cleanest PIT source. 'date' string (YYYY-MM-DD) maps directly to asOfDate. Adapter should return null when no record exists at or before asOfDate — not an error, just absent data.

eligibleDesignCandidates.pitGate: date field (YYYY-MM-DD string) with pitSafetyJson metadata
eligibleDesignCandidates.pitGateStatus: PRESENT_IN_SCHEMA — pitSafetyJson field already exists for PIT audit trail
eligibleDesignCandidates.pitDescription: MarketRegimeResult.date is the regime computation date. MarketRegimeResult.pitSafetyJson is an existing nullable JSON field for PIT audit context. Reading with 'WHERE date <= asOfDate' is PIT-safe. The source and version fields enable adapter versioning.
forbiddenAdaptations: Using regimeLabel as a buy/sell signal
eligibleDesignCandidates.designNotes: MarketRegimeResult is PIT-safe with existing pitSafetyJson audit field. regimeLabel ('Bull'/'Bear'/'Sideways'/'Unknown') and confidence are descriptive only — they describe the current market state, not a prediction.

eligibleDesignCandidates.pitGate: releaseDate field (DateTime?, nullable, P17 PIT gate)
eligibleDesignCandidates.pitGateStatus: PRESENT_IN_SCHEMA — releaseDate is nullable (no migration required), releaseDateSource and releaseDateConfidence present
eligibleDesignCandidates.pitDescription: MonthlyRevenue.releaseDate is the date revenue was publicly released. releaseDateSource can be 'INFERRED_NEXT_MONTH_10TH' (estimated) or 'EXPLICIT' (confirmed). releaseDateConfidence ('LOW_TO_MEDIUM' or 'HIGH') controls eligibility tier. When releaseDate IS NULL, source must be treated as BLOCKED — do not fall back to (year, month) boundary.
eligibilityRules: releaseDate IS NOT NULL AND releaseDate <= asOfDate → SourceInputState ELIGIBLE
releaseDate IS NULL → SourceInputState BLOCKED (no PIT metadata)
releaseDateConfidence = 'LOW_TO_MEDIUM' AND releaseDateSource = 'INFERRED_NEXT_MONTH_10TH' → flag LOW_CONFIDENCE_PIT_INFERRED in audit output
releaseDateConfidence = 'HIGH' AND releaseDateSource = 'EXPLICIT' → no additional caveat
forbiddenAdaptations: Comparing revenue to targetPrice or outcomePrice
Using yoyGrowth as a return estimate
Using revenue to derive expected profit
Treating releaseDateConfidence='LOW_TO_MEDIUM' as a trading signal
eligibleDesignCandidates.designNotes: MonthlyRevenue is the only eligible-with-caveat candidate. The inferred releaseDate (INFERRED_NEXT_MONTH_10TH) is a reasonable approximation for Taiwan TWSE monthly reporting deadline but must be surfaced as a caveat in all audit artifacts. Adapter must not suppress the LOW_CONFIDENCE_PIT_INFERRED flag.

blockedSources.blockerDetail: FinancialReport model has no releaseDate, filingDate, or announceDate field. Using (year, quarter) boundary as a PIT gate is NOT acceptable — financial reports can be filed weeks to months after quarter end. CEO P6 identifies this as requiring a DB migration ('YES apply FinancialReport releaseDate migration to dev DB').
blockedSources.authorizationRequired: YES apply FinancialReport releaseDate migration to dev DB
blockedSources.unblockPath: 1. Add releaseDate DateTime? to FinancialReport model. 2. Run migration. 3. Backfill releaseDate for historical records from TWSE/MOPS announcement dates. 4. Upgrade releaseDateConfidence field. 5. Revisit eligibility.
blockedSources.designNotes: FinancialReport is a high-value fundamental source. The PIT gap is a known limitation — eps, netIncome, grossMargin cannot be queried safely without a public announcement date. This is NOT a data quality issue; it is a schema governance issue. No workarounds permitted.

blockedSources.blockerDetail: InstitutionalChip.availableAt (P30 PIT gate) is nullable (DateTime?). The P30 design assumes T+0 data is available at ~17:30 TWN (09:30 UTC). This assumption has NOT been validated against production logs. CEO P8/P9: availableAt migration apply blocked by authorization; production log acquisition is an external dependency ('CHIP_LAG_CONFIRMED' not yet granted).
blockedSources.authorizationRequired: YES apply Chip availableAt migration to dev DB
blockedSources.productionEvidenceRequired: CHIP_LAG_CONFIRMED — production sync logs must confirm actual T86 availability time vs assumed 17:30 TWN
blockedSources.unblockPath: 1. Apply availableAt migration to dev DB. 2. Acquire production sync logs. 3. Confirm T86 lag empirically. 4. Upgrade availableAt precision to NOT NULL with confirmed constraint. 5. Revisit eligibility.
blockedSources.designNotes: foreignBuy, trustBuy, dealerBuy, totalBuy, holders400, holders1000 are high-value institutional flow indicators. The PIT gap (nullable availableAt) is real and consequential — lag assumptions affect whether chip data can be considered available at asOfDate.

auditOnlySources.pitGate: publishedAt (DateTime, NOT NULL — non-nullable in schema)
auditOnlySources.pitGateStatus: PRESENT_IN_SCHEMA — publishedAt is non-nullable, PIT gate mechanically available
auditOnlySources.qualityBlocker: CEO P7 — NewsEvent source-present is NOT equivalent to quality-ready. trustLevel field values ('official'|'mainstream'|'secondary'|'unknown') exist but a quality/symbol-linkage audit has not been completed. relatedSymbols is stored as a JSON string — symbol linkage accuracy is not validated.
auditOnlySources.auditOnlyReason: NewsEvent can be read and surfaced in audit artifacts to show 'news events available as of asOfDate for symbol X'. It must NOT feed simulation eligibility or SourceInputState=ELIGIBLE until trustLevel filtering logic and symbol-linkage accuracy are established.
forbiddenAdaptations: Using news sentiment as a buy/sell signal
Treating trustLevel='official' as an eligibility override
Any NLP-based score or probability from summary
auditOnlySources.designNotes: NewsEvent qualifies as AUDIT_ONLY in the current design. It can appear in the SnapshotReadout auditOnlySources list. CEO P7 newsEvent quality audit is a prerequisite for upgrading to ELIGIBLE.

allowedInputFieldsUniversal: asOfDate (YYYY-MM-DD, PIT boundary — must equal or precede all source record dates)

v1InputContractDesign.description: Axis A v1 input layer: ControlledResearchSnapshot continues to be the entry point. v1 adds a SourceAdapterLayer that converts real Prisma DB records into typed SourceInputFact structs, which are then assembled into a ControlledResearchSnapshot by a ResearchSnapshotInputBuilder.

newConceptsToDesign.description: Typed, PIT-validated wrapper around a single source record. Carries: sourceType, asOfDate, pitGateField, pitGateValue, pitGateStatus, data: T. Never carries forbidden fields.

Interface defining how to transform a raw Prisma model row (TInput) into a SourceInputFact<TFact>. Per-source: QuoteAdapter, RegimeAdapter, MonthlyRevenueAdapter. Adapter returns null when no PIT-safe record exists.

Assembles a ControlledResearchSnapshot from a set of SourceInputFact values returned by the adapters. Sets SourceInputState per source based on adapter result: non-null fact → ELIGIBLE (or ELIGIBLE_WITH_CAVEAT for MonthlyRevenue LOW_CONFIDENCE), null fact → BLOCKED, audit-only → AUDIT_ONLY.
Typed subset of StockQuote fields allowed into the adapter: { stockId, date, close, open, high, low, volume, change, transactions, tradeValue }. No scoring fields.
Typed subset of MarketRegimeResult fields allowed: { date, regimeLabel, confidence, pitSafetyJson, source, version }. No prediction fields.

Typed subset of MonthlyRevenue fields allowed: { year, month, revenue, yoyGrowth, momGrowth, releaseDate, releaseDateSource, releaseDateConfidence }. Adapter must check releaseDate IS NOT NULL and releaseDate <= asOfDate before returning ELIGIBLE fact.

futureImplementationCandidates.role: Core type: SourceInputFact<T> wrapper with PIT metadata
Pure function: MonthlyRevenueAdapterInput → SourceInputFact<MonthlyRevenueFactData> | null, with LOW_CONFIDENCE_PIT_INFERRED flag
Assembles ControlledResearchSnapshot from SourceInputFact values; sets SourceInputState per source
Re-exports all v1 types and functions
Tests for SourceInputFact + all three adapter stubs
Tests for ResearchSnapshotInputBuilder: null-fact → BLOCKED, non-null → ELIGIBLE, LOW_CONFIDENCE flag propagation

requiredFutureTests.description: SourceInputFact type: shape validation, PIT field presence, no forbidden fields
QuoteAdapter: PIT-safe record → ELIGIBLE fact; asOfDate after record date → ELIGIBLE; no record → null; forbidden fields absent
QuoteAdapter: future asOfDate → null; PIT boundary enforced
RegimeAdapter: valid record → ELIGIBLE fact; regimeLabel descriptive only; confidence numeric; pitSafetyJson passthrough; no forbidden fields
RegimeAdapter: no record for asOfDate → null
MonthlyRevenueAdapter: releaseDate IS NOT NULL AND <= asOfDate → ELIGIBLE fact
MonthlyRevenueAdapter: releaseDate IS NULL → null (BLOCKED, not ELIGIBLE)
MonthlyRevenueAdapter: releaseDate IS NOT NULL but > asOfDate → null (future release, PIT violation)
MonthlyRevenueAdapter: releaseDateConfidence=LOW_TO_MEDIUM → LOW_CONFIDENCE_PIT_INFERRED flag present in returned fact
All adapters: input non-mutation; output frozen; JSON-serializable; no DB/network/FS imports in adapter modules

All adapters: forbidden field scan (20 fields: recommendation, action, buy, sell, hold, targetPrice, ROI, PnL, winRate, edge, alphaScore, score, forecast, expectedReturn, benchmark, optimizer, backtest, outcomePrice, returnPct, profit)
ResearchSnapshotInputBuilder: all adapters return non-null → all sources ELIGIBLE; researchReadinessStatus=SNAPSHOT_READY
ResearchSnapshotInputBuilder: one adapter returns null → that source BLOCKED; status=SNAPSHOT_PARTIAL
ResearchSnapshotInputBuilder: all adapters return null → all sources BLOCKED; status=SNAPSHOT_BLOCKED
ResearchSnapshotInputBuilder: MonthlyRevenue LOW_CONFIDENCE fact → ELIGIBLE with caveat flag in SnapshotReadout; caveat visible in audit output
ResearchSnapshotInputBuilder: governance invariants always set (entersAlphaScore=false, paperOnly=true, dryRunOnly=true, notInvestmentAdvice=true) regardless of source states
ResearchSnapshotInputBuilder: no forbidden fields in output ControlledResearchSnapshot

authorizationGates.authorizationPhrase: YES apply FinancialReport releaseDate migration to dev DB
authorizationGates.blockedItem: FinancialReport source adapter design and implementation
authorizationGates.blockedBy: CEO P6 — missing releaseDate column in FinancialReport schema; migration not authorized
authorizationGates.consequence: FinancialReport remains BLOCKED_PENDING_PIT_METADATA until migration is applied and releaseDate backfill is completed

authorizationGates.authorizationPhrase: YES apply Chip availableAt migration to dev DB
authorizationGates.blockedItem: InstitutionalChip source adapter design and implementation
authorizationGates.blockedBy: CEO P8 — availableAt is nullable; migration not authorized; production lag not empirically confirmed
CEO P9 — T86 actual availability time vs assumed 17:30 TWN not confirmed by production evidence
authorizationGates.consequence: Even after availableAt migration, ChipAdapter must not be marked ELIGIBLE until production log evidence confirms lag

authorizationGates.authorizationPhrase: YES begin NewsEvent quality and symbol-linkage audit
authorizationGates.blockedItem: NewsEvent upgrade from AUDIT_ONLY to ELIGIBLE
authorizationGates.blockedBy: CEO P7 — trustLevel filtering policy and symbol-linkage accuracy not established
authorizationGates.consequence: NewsEvent remains AUDIT_ONLY until quality audit (CEO P7) completes and trustLevel policy is documented

pitSafetyPrinciples: PRINCIPLE 1: No source record may feed a SnapshotReadout unless its PIT gate field value is <= asOfDate. Greater-than asOfDate = future data = PIT violation.
PRINCIPLE 2: NULL PIT gate field = BLOCKED. Never infer a PIT boundary from record creation time (createdAt) alone.
PRINCIPLE 3: Adapter returns null → builder assigns BLOCKED, never a default or fallback ELIGIBLE.
PRINCIPLE 4: LOW_CONFIDENCE PIT inference must be surfaced in the audit artifact, never silently accepted as ELIGIBLE-equivalent.
PRINCIPLE 5: Adapter modules must have zero DB/network/FS imports — they transform input structs, they do not query. The query layer is the caller's responsibility.
PRINCIPLE 6: All adapter output types must pass the forbidden-fields scan (20 fields) as a test invariant.

axisAV1ChainDesign.principle: The v0 chain stages (P43–P52) remain completely unchanged. Only the construction of the ControlledResearchSnapshot at the chain entry point changes in v1.

nextPhaseDescription: Implement SourceInputFact<T> type and three source adapter stubs (QuoteAdapter, RegimeAdapter, MonthlyRevenueAdapter) as pure TypeScript functions in src/lib/research/snapshot/v1/. Pure in-memory, no DB, no Prisma calls in adapter layer. ≥16 tests per CTO contract. Adapter stubs accept typed input structs and return SourceInputFact or null.
axisBalanceNote: Current Axis A:B ratio after P52-P55 = ~12:4. P56 is design-only (no Axis A src round). Before P57 implementation, assess whether another Axis B round is needed to maintain anti-axis-monopoly balance per CEO Decision 2026-05-25.
